sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
from collections import Counter

# The g pattern is at (18-21, 29-32), center around (19.5, 30.5)
# Let me try clicking on the g pattern
print("=== Click on g pattern center (19, 30) ===")
result = action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 19, 'col': 30}])
print(f"After click: score={last_action_result.get('score')}, level_completed={last_action_result.get('level_completed')}")

seg = current_frame.segmentation
colors = Counter(n['color'] for n in seg['nodes'])
print(f"Colors: {dict(colors)}")

G_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'G']
g_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'g']
N_nodes = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['color'] == 'N']
print(f"G={len(G_nodes)}, g={len(g_nodes)}, N={len(N_nodes)}")

# Check grid
print("\nGrid area (row 17-22):")
ascii_lines = current_frame.ascii.split('\n')
for i in range(17, 23):
    print(f"{i}: {ascii_lines[i][10:48]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
